# Lightning K-Fold

> Drop-in stratified K-fold cross-validation with ensemble voting for PyTorch Lightning. Provides KFoldDataModule for stratified data splitting, KFoldTrainer for automated fold iteration and checkpointing, and EnsembleVotingModel for averaging predictions across fold checkpoints.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/README.md): Installation, usage, and examples
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Architecture and development guide
- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): Version history

## API / Key Files

- [src/lightning_kfold/__init__.py](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/src/lightning_kfold/__init__.py): Public API exports
- [src/lightning_kfold/datamodule.py](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/src/lightning_kfold/datamodule.py): KFoldDataModule with stratified splitting
- [src/lightning_kfold/trainer.py](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/src/lightning_kfold/trainer.py): KFoldTrainer orchestrator
- [src/lightning_kfold/ensemble.py](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/src/lightning_kfold/ensemble.py): EnsembleVotingModel for averaged inference

## Optional

- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Skill](https://github.com/urmzd/lightning-kfold/blob/main/skills/lightning-kfold/SKILL.md): Agent skill
